Operation 'createDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, or side effects. Improved summary uses domain terminology ('paste') consistent with API context. Description now explains what the operation does, what inputs it expects (document content), what it returns (document object with ID), and side effects (document becomes available for retrieval).

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new paste document with the provided text content. Accepts the document content in the request body. Returns the created document object with a unique document ID and metadata. The document is immediately available for retrieval.
data.reasoning: Original description is empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, or side effects. Improved summary uses domain terminology ('paste') consistent with API context. Description now explains what the operation does, what inputs it expects (document content), what it returns (document object with ID), and side effects (document becomes available for retrieval).

message: Operation 'getDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is empty, leaving AI agents uncertain about return format and error handling. Improved description specifies what is returned (complete document object with content and metadata) and error behavior, enabling better decision-making by AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paste document by its unique document ID. Returns the complete document object including the text content, creation timestamp, and metadata. Returns an error if the document ID does not exist.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is empty, leaving AI agents uncertain about return format and error handling. message: Operation 'getDocumentRaw' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear but description is empty. Improved description explains the key difference from getDocument (raw text only, no metadata), clarifies the use case (direct content access, integration), and specifies error handling. This helps AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus getDocument.

data.current_summary: Fetch raw plain text content of a document
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the raw plain text content of a paste document by its document ID. Returns only the document's text content without metadata or JSON formatting. Useful for direct content access or integration with text processing tools. Returns an error if the document ID does not exist.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is empty. Improved description explains the key difference from getDocument (raw text only, no metadata), clarifies the use case (direct content access, integration), and specifies error handling. This helps AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus getDocument.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the Spacebin instance configuration settings. Returns configuration details such as server version, feature flags, storage limits, and other instance-specific settings. Useful for clients to understand server capabilities and constraints.
